title: RotHunter multi-workspace configuration
description: Configuration file consumed by rothunter when scanning a group of linked workspaces. Drop this in the root workspace and rothunter will treat the listed siblings as a single logical project for the cross-repo detectors (dead-api, duplicate-type, …).

$schema.description: Pointer to this JSON Schema. Enables autocomplete + validation in IDEs that support JSON Schema (VS Code, JetBrains, Sublime LSP).

workspaces.description: Linked workspaces. Each entry points at a sibling directory on disk and is treated as a member of the same logical project.

path.description: Filesystem path to the workspace. Relative paths are resolved against the directory containing this config file. Absolute paths are accepted.

name.description: Stable logical identifier (e.g. 'backend', 'frontend'). Used as a path prefix in findings + fingerprints; must be unique within the config.

package.description: Optional npm-style package name. When set, bare-specifier imports matching this package (e.g. import { X } from '@org/backend') are resolved into this workspace's source tree, allowing cross-workspace dead-export / dead-api detection. If omitted, falls back to the workspace's package.json#name.
